basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA)
basic_details.short_information: National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has published the Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 01-09/2026-Admn. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA) position. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding a Master's degree in Disaster Management, Computer Applications (MCA), Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, GIS, Public Policy, Social Sciences, or Environmental Science are eligible to apply online through the official NDMA website. The application proces

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 20 days from the date of publication of advertisement (29-07-2026)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Maximum age limit is 62 years for retired Govt. employees

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Disaster Management, Computer Applications (MCA), Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, GIS, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Environmental Science
qualification.details: Master's degree in Disaster Management, Computer Applications (MCA), Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, GIS, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Environmental Science.

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NDMA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NDMA Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NDMA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NDMA Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA)

content_sections.heading: NDMA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in Disaster Management, Computer Applications (MCA), Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, GIS, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Environmental Science.

content_sections.heading: NDMA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Maximum age limit is 62 years for retired Govt. employees

rows.date: 20 days from the date of publication of advertisement (29 July 2026)

content_sections.heading: NDMA Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NDMA to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NDMA Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NDMA Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA) position is 29-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Disaster Management, Computer Applications (MCA), Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, GIS, Public Policy, Social Sciences, or Environmental Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 40 years. However, retired Government employees can apply up to 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 1,00,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Project Review & Coordinator DM-II Division, MHA) post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official NDMA website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) located?
faq.answer: The NDMA is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01-09/2026-Admn.
